description.value:
Frequency once per hour

Effect You focus your light into a soothing beam that encompasses a single dying creature within 60 feet. The target loses the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Dying] condition (it still remains @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Unconscious] at 0 Hit Points). You can additionally choose to transfer a portion of your own vital spark into the target, sacrificing up to 1 Hit Point per level to heal the target the same amount. If you do, the target doesn't gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Wounded] condition.
